dinner reservations in san antonio
emails.body: dinner reservations in san antonio We've picked up two more diners for La Fogata in San Antonio, Andrea Calo and Yao Apasu. Can you call back the restaurant and switch our reservation to two tables of 8 people, instead of one table of 14. I think a table of 8 will be more manageable than a table of 16. Thanks!
